nodes.context: Yakuza group based in Okinawa, Japan; largest yakuza organization in Okinawa Prefecture with about 300 members.
Yakuza group based in Okinawa, Japan; former parent organization of Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai.
Yakuza group in Okinawa Prefecture; third-largest yakuza organization in the prefecture.

edges.context: Okinawa Kyokuryu-kai split from Kyokuryu-kai in 1990; they are now separate but both designated yakuza groups in Okinawa.
